command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.199 bash << 'REMOTE'
echo "=== Group administrators (bots usually show here if admin) ==="
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8993450718:AAFes1_h347Wa_t_FIrx_dmpHa8MsNp1G0g/getChatAdministrators?chat_id=-1003934415467' | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
if d.get('ok'):
    for a in d['result']:
        u=a.get('user',{})
        print(f\"  {a.get('status')}: id={u.get('id')} bot={u.get('is_bot')} name={u.get('first_name')} username=@{u.get('username','none')}\")
else:
    print('error:', d.get('description'))
"

echo ""
echo "=== Member count ==="
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8993450718:AAFes1_h347Wa_t_FIrx_dmpHa8MsNp1G0g/getChatMemberCount?chat_id=-1003934415467' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print('members:', d.get('result'))"

echo ""
echo "=== Is YOUR Remy bot (8993450718) the only Remy? Check its profile ==="
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8993450718:AAFes1_h347Wa_t_FIrx_dmpHa8MsNp1G0g/getChatMember?chat_id=-1003934415467&user_id=8993450718' | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
if d.get('ok'):
    u=d['result'].get('user',{})
    print(f\"  YOUR Remy: id={u.get('id')} name={u.get('first_name')} username=@{u.get('username')} status={d['result'].get('status')}\")
else:
    print('error:', d.get('description'))
"

echo ""
echo "=== Check the OLD compromised token's bot info (is it still named Remy in group?) ==="
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8849049212:AAH2CHM_CDLDeTLfVxw7UGz5aO1weVBdnpw/getChatAdministrators?chat_id=-1003934415467' 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys,json
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
if d.get('ok'):
    print('  (via Sakura token) admins in group:')
    for a in d['result']:
        u=a.get('user',{})
        print(f\"    {a.get('status')}: id={u.get('id')} bot={u.get('is_bot')} @{u.get('username','none')} name={u.get('first_name')}\")
" 2>/dev/null
REMOTE
